findings.title: Sidecar memory profile under 50 sequential lesson-plan calls
findings.evidence: Static: InMemoryRunner constructed per-request; InMemorySessionService dict scoped to runner local; module-level caches are @lru_cache(maxsize<=2).

findings.title: Next.js dispatcher heap growth across calls
findings.evidence: Only module-globals are: 18× tokenClientByAudience Map keyed by single env var (constant), TTS_CACHE bounded at 500 entries.

findings.title: Embedding cache qa/embedding-cache/ unbounded on disk
findings.evidence: rag/embeddings.embed_query raises NotImplementedError (Phase 4.2 stub). No on-disk cache exists.

findings.title: OIDC tokenClient cache unbounded
findings.evidence: Cache keyed by SAHAYAKAI_AGENTS_AUDIENCE env var (single value per process); eviction-on-reject prevents poison.

findings.title: Notification batch fan-out unbounded array buffer
findings.evidence: RECIPIENT_CAP=50; Firestore-side limit(100); JS slice(0, 50); single batch under 500/batch ceiling.

findings.title: Pub/Sub storage-cleanup ack rules
findings.evidence: Returns 200 on success or 404 (idempotent); returns 500 on other errors → Pub/Sub retries.

findings.title: Long-text TTS: unbounded parallel fan-out and transient buffer
findings.evidence: No text-length guard on /api/tts. googleTTS does Promise.all over chunkText(text, 500) with no concurrency cap. 50,000-char input → 100 parallel outbound TTS fetches per request; coordinated abuse can pin >500 MB transient buffer + 8,000 outbound connections at default Cloud Run concurrency 80.
fix: Replace Promise.all with p-limit(4) concurrency gate
Burn voice-quota minutes against text.length before chunking

findings.title: Audio upload: 10 MB cap enforced AFTER full formData() buffer
findings.evidence: request.formData() awaits before size check; 100 MB upload buffers fully into memory before 413 is returned. Coordinated abuse can OOM the 1 Gi container at concurrency 20.
fix: Check Content-Length header first; reject >MAX_AUDIO_BYTES*1.1 pre-parse
Long-term: stream uploads directly to GCS, pass URI to STT

findings.title: TTS audio cache: entry count capped, byte size uncapped
findings.evidence: TTS_CACHE bounded at 500 items but each entry is a base64 MP3 of arbitrary size. 500 × ~600 KB = ~300 MB resident, 24 h TTL.
fix: Track cumulative byte size; evict on bytes>64 MiB in addition to count
Or cap per-entry buffer size (skip caching giants)

followups.title: Live sidecar memory profile under 50× lesson-plan load
followups.blocking_reason: gcloud impersonation not validated in forensic sandbox; HMAC signing key required for direct sidecar invocation.
followups.promote_to_p0_if: memory utilisation grows monotonically past the 10th request
